{{Quote|Have you ever seen one of these? Let me show you what it does.|[[Harro Ruuk]] to [[Nym/Legends|Nym]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
The '''crab submarine''' was a vehicle used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] aquatic navy.

One such model was commandeered by [[Harro Ruuk]] after his [[Trade Federation sensor station|sensor station]] on [[Maramere]] was destroyed by the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]]. Ruuk escaped the explosion in his vessel, and launched a desperate assault on [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] and his colleagues. Ruuk was defeated, and his submarine was destroyed, though Ruuk himself escaped in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].

{{Veh-stub}}

The crab submarine was armed with two rapid-fire [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], and four homing [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
